title: selaginella hartwegiana
intro: Selaginella hartwegiana, also known as Hartweg's spikemoss, is a type of evergreen, perennial plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antifungal, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Selaginella hartwegiana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Selaginella hartwegiana can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, tincture, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
